2605.07782.title: CktFormalizer: Autoformalization of Natural Language into Circuit Representations
2605.07782.paper_summary: LLMs can generate hardware descriptions from natural language specifications, but the resulting Verilog often contains width mismatches, combinational loops, and incomplete case logic that pass syntax checks yet fail in synthesis or silicon. We present CktFormalizer, a framework that redirects LLM-driven hardware generation through a dependently-typed HDL embedded in Lean 4. Lean serves three roles: (i) type checker:dependent types encode bit-width constraints, case coverage, and acyclicity, turning hardware defects into compile-time errors that guide iterative repair; (ii) correctness firewall:compiled designs are structurally free of defects that cause silent backend failures (the baseline loses 20% of correct designs during synthesis and routing; CktFormalizer preserves all of them); (iii) proof assistant:the agent constructs machine-checked equivalence proofs over arbitrary input sequences and parameterized widths, beyond the reach of bounded SMT-based checking. On VerilogEval (156 problems), RTLLM (50 problems), and ResBench (56 problems), CktFormalizer achieves simulation pass rates competitive with direct Verilog generation while delivering substantially higher backend realizability: 95--100% of compiled designs complete the full synthesis, place-and-route, DRC, and LVS flow. A closed-loop PPA optimization stage yields up to 35% area reduction and 30% power reduction through validated architecture exploration, with automated theorem proof ensuring that each optimized variant remains functionally equivalent to its formal specification.
2605.07782.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 可以從自然語言規範生成硬體描述，但生成的 Verilog 通常包含寬度不匹配、組合迴路和不完整的 case 邏輯，這些問題雖然通過語法檢查，但在綜合或矽片中失敗。我們提出了 CktFormalizer，一個通過嵌入在 Lean 4 中的依賴類型 HDL 重定向 LLM 驅動的硬體生成的框架。Lean 扮演三個角色：（i）類型檢查器：依賴類型編碼位寬約束、case 覆蓋和無環性，將硬體缺陷轉化為編譯時錯誤，指導迭代修復；（ii）正確性防火牆：編譯的設計在結構上沒有導致靜默後端失敗的缺陷（基準在綜合和佈局中損失 20% 的正確設計；CktFormalizer 保留了所有這些設計）；（iii）證明助手：該代理構建了針對任意輸入序列和參數化寬度的機器檢查等價證明，超出了有界 SMT 基檢查的範疇。在 VerilogEval（156 個問題）、RTLLM（50 個問題）和 ResBench（56 個問題）上，CktFormalizer 實現了與直接 Verilog 生成相媲美的模擬通過率，同時提供了顯著更高的後端可實現性：95--100% 的編譯設計完成了完整的綜合、佈局和路由、DRC 和 LVS 流程。一個閉環 PPA 優化階段通過驗證的架構探索實現了高達 35% 的面積減少和 30% 的功率減少，並且自動定理證明確保每個優化變體在功能上與其正式規範保持等效。
2605.07782.author: Jing Xiong et.al.
2605.07782.authors: Jing Xiong, Qi Han, Chenchen Ding, He Xiao, Zunhai Su, Chaofan Tao, Ngai Wong
